awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: Compilation of Scala Native resources and libraries
awesomeListMeta.description: Compilation of Scala Native resources and libraries

nodes.itemHTML: • Catsstars4.8k - Abstractions for functional programming in Scala.
• declinestars564 - A composable command-line parser for Scala.
• Millstars1.8k - Build tool striving for simplicity, inspired by Bazel.
• FastParsestars1k - Library for defining and running parsers.
• scalatagsstars702 - HTML/XML construction and rendering.
• uJson - fast, flexible and intuitive JSON for Scala
• castorstars105 - Lightweight, typed Actor library for Scala.
• fansistars206 - Library for creating ANSI-coloured strings.
• mainargsstars145 - Small, dependency-free library for command line argument parsing in Scala.
• libpq4sstars2 - Scala wrapper around the async PostgreSQL C library libpq.
• squigglystars2 - Cross-platform template language for Scala, inspired by Liquid and Hugo templates.
• iupstars2 - Bindings for the IUP multi-platform toolkit for building graphical user interfaces.
• libyamlstars0 - Bindings for the LibYAML C library for parsing YAML.
• cairo-xlibstars0 - Bindings for the Cairo 2D graphics XLib Surfaces with bindings for XLib as well.
• libcairostars1 - Bindings for the Cairo 2D graphics C library.
• Write a simple CLI application in Scala Nativestars8
• libpngstars0 - Bindings for the libpng C reference library for reading and writing PNGs.
• libsndfilestars2 - Bindings for the Libsndfile C library for sampled sound manipulation.
• readlinestars0 - Bindings for the GNU Readline Library.
• ncursesstars1 - Bindings for the GNU Ncurses Library.
• Modern systems programming with scala native book.
• fractalsstars7 - A self-similar fractal generator with basic animation support.
• snunitstars85 - Scala Native HTTP server based on NGINX Unit.
• Quicklensstars740 - Modify deeply nested case class fields.
• µTeststars459 - Library for unit tests.
• ScalaCheckstars1.8k - Property-based testing for Scala.
• ScalaTeststars1.1k - Testing library.
• specs2stars727 - Software Specifications for Scala.
• MUnitstars335 - Scala testing library with actionable errors and extensible APIs.
• SDL2 and OpenGLstars37 - Bindings for the graphical frameworks SDL2 and OpenGL.
• GNU Scientific Librarystars3 - Bindings for GNU Scientific Library (GSL).
• BLASstars27 - Bindings for BLAS, a library for Linear Algebra.
• sconfigstars95 - HOCON parser.
• sttpstars1.3k - HTTP Client library.
• scala-native-loopstars46 - Event loop and async-oriented IO for Scala Native
• SQLite4Sstars29 - Port of the Java library Sqlite4java. Includes bindings for the SQLite native library.
• Qtstars8 - Bindings for Qt.
• Starter for Gtk+ Projectsstars1 - Giter8 template for Scala Native GUI projects using Gtk+.
• GStreamerstars2 - Bindings for the GStreamer multimedia framework.
• scallopstars638 - A simple Scala CLI parsing library.
• sbt - Scala's standard build tool.
• Bloopstars822 - Scala build server and command-line tool for fast developer workflows.
• Seedstars237 - Build tool based on Bloop. Focuses on user experience and cross-platform builds, inspired by Cargostars9k.
• noboxstars32 - Immutable primitive array wrapper without boxing.
• miniteststars178 - Lightweight testing library.
• libsoupstars2 - Bindings for the libsoup HTTP client/server library.
• libuistars57 - GUI framework based on libuistars10.3k.
• Pinestars105 - HTML/XML parsing, manipulation and rendering.
• toml-scalastars23 - TOMLstars17.5k parser with codec derivation.
• Trailstars80 - Routing library.
• scribestars413 - Fast and simple logging library.
• scala-optparse-applicativestars13 - Port of Haskell's CLI argument parsing library optparse-applicative.
• Coursierstars1.9k - Coursier's bootstrap command generates native launchers.
• Seed Docker image - Docker image for cross-platform builds with Seedstars237.
• Giter8 template for a minimal Scala Native projectstars67 - Official Giter8 template for a minimal Scala Native project.
• Hands on Scala Nativestars27 - Tutorial for implementing a bandwidth monitor with Ncurses.
• Starter for Scala Nativestars26 - Scala Native project that links to a custom C library.
• Building C code using sbt-jnistars3 - Example for compiling C code in a Scala Native project using sbt-jnistars115.
• Example project with external dependenciesstars50 - Example project that uses external dependencies to generate HTML and run a test suite.
• Shapelessstars3.3k - Library for generic programming.
• Squantsstars876 - DSL for quantities, units of measure and dimensional analysis.
• scalazstars4.6k - Type classes and instances for data structures.
• PPrintstars183 - Pretty-print values and types.
• SourceCodestars484 - Implicits providing meta data similar to __LINE__ in C.
• reactifystars78 - Functional Reactive Programming framework for Scala.
• chimneystars887 - Boilerplate-free data transformations.

• scalapropsstars272 - Library for property-based testing.
    • scalaprops-shapelessstars9 - Generation of arbitrary ADT instances.
    • scalaprops-cross-examplestars2 - Cross-platform example.
• Makeshiftstars1 - Library for unit tests.
• cmarkstars13 - Bindings for the cmarkstars1.4k CommonMark parser library.
• libuvstars8 - Bindings for libuvstars20.2k, a library for asynchronous I/O.
• Cocoastars20 - Bindings for the macOS graphical framework Cocoa.
• Gtk+stars26 - Bindings for the GTK+ graphical toolkit.
• msgpack4zstars3 - Implementation of MessagePack, a binary serialisation format.
• scala-jsonstars61 - JSON parser.
• argonautstars536 - Purely functional JSON parser and library.

• ScalaPBstars1.2k - Protocol Buffer compiler for Scala.
    • scalapb-argonautstars1 - JSON and Protocol Buffer converters for ScalaPB based on Argonaut.
• JDBCstars8 - Port of the database access layer JDBC to Scala Native.
• sloggingstars49 - Typesafe-loggingstars881 and SLF4J-compatible logging library based on macros.
• scoptstars1.4k - Command-line argument parser.
• Potassiumstars18 - Framework for writing robot software.
• WPILibstars7 - Reimplementation of the FIRST Robotics WPILib libraries.
• sglgearsstars15 - Port of GL gears.c.
• k8s-clistars3 - CLI tools to generate Kubernetes resources for Akka, Play Framework and Lagom-based applications.
• scala-native-sbt-dockerstars4 - Docker image for Scala Native and sbt.
